prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜约第33名（2026年），近年排名稳定在28–33区间，属于国内顶尖理工类高校；2026年声誉 评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应及师德师风事件，可能轻微抑制部分考生报考意愿；抖音热度排名第33（较热），短视频曝光中等偏上；信息与通信工程 A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、仪器科学与技术A-、光学工程A-，均为当前社会高度关注的领域，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类 2024年高热推荐、计算机类推荐（67.8），对电子科技大学形成报考利好；湖南省物理类考生2026年约34.7万人，较2025年约32.0万人增加约8.34%，考生规模扩大使竞争加剧；电子科技大学位于四川成都，非湖南省内高校，在湖南省物理类招生计划从2021年87人逐年降至2026年73人，招生规模持续缩减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次2025年小幅后移、2026年招生计划缩招约5.2%（缓和竞争）、湖南省物理类考生增加约8.34%（加剧竞争）、电子信息/计算机类专业持续高热（增强报考 意愿）等多因素，缩招与考生增加效应部分抵消，专业热度利好略占上风，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅前移；预测最低位次约2875名，区间2444–3306名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3743 → 3474 → 2917 → 2730 → 2936, with a continuous forward shift (decreasing ranking number) from 2021 to 2024, and a slight backward shift of about 206 places in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 2936; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 87 in 2021, 85 in 2022, 80 in 2023, 78 in 2024, and 77 in 2025, decreasing slightly each year; the 2026 plan is 73, a decrease of 4 from 2025 (a reduction of about 5.2%), which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 33rd on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 28–33 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic science and engineering universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents, which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking 33rd (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure; Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, all in highly socially focused fields, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, Computer majors recommended (67.8), creating a favorable application environment for University of Electronic Science and Technology of China; Hunan Province Physics Category candidates in 2026 are approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.34% from approximately 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool; the university is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not within Hunan Province, and its Physics Category enrollment plan in Hunan has decreased from 87 in 2021 to 73 in 2026, with a continuous reduction in enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the slight backward shift in historical rankings in 2025, the approximately 5.2% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), the approximately 8.34% increase in Hunan Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), and the sustained high popularity of electronic information/computer majors (enhancing application willingness), the effects of enrollment reduction and candidate increase partially offset each other, with the favorable impact of major popularity slightly outweighing; it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2875, with a range of 2444–3306.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1827 → 1868 → 1665. It remained basically stable from 2023 to 2024, and in 2025 it moved forward by about 203 places (ranking number decreased) compared to 2024, showing a forward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1665. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 6 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 5, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; approximately 33rd in the Soft Science main ranking. It is a top-tier science and engineering university, but offers few History Category majors (only Social Science Experimental Class and Foreign Languages and Literature), which are not its strengths. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but mainly involves science and engineering events, with limited impact on History Category applications. Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with moderate overall exposure. UESTC's strengths are concentrated in electronic information, computer science, and other engineering fields. The History Category majors (Social Science Experimental Class, Foreign Languages and Literature) have no corresponding A-class discipline evaluations, so their disciplinary appeal is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category majors are Social Science Experimental Class (Administrative Management, Urban Management, Law) and Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Japanese, French). Popularity among related major categories is polarized (Law is recommended, Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see). In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province is approximately 187,000, a significant increase of about 31.2% from approximately 142,500 in 2025, leading to a notable expansion of the examinee pool and intensified competition. UESTC is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university. With only 5 History Category slots, the enrollment scale is extremely small, making it a niche choice for Hunan History Category examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward shift in historical rankings in 2025, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 31.2% in Hunan History Category examinees (markedly intensifying competition), and the fact that History Category majors are not UESTC's strengths, the expansion of the examinee pool is the dominant factor. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1745, with a range of 1483–2007.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: UESTC only enrolls 5 students (2 majors) in History Category in Hunan Province, with an extremely small enrollment scale, so ranking fluctuations may be large. Within the predicted ranking range of 1483–2007, it is recommended to take the Social Science Experimental Class as the main target and Foreign Languages and Literature as a safe choice. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 1500), you can aim for the Social Science Experimental Class. If the ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., above 1900), careful evaluation is needed, as the actual admission ranking may be greatly affected by random factors due to the very small number of enrollments.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In Hunan Province, the admission rankings for medical programs (Clinical Medicine) at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China over the past four years are: 2022: 6078th (planned 6 students), 2023: 5295th (planned 6 students), 2024: 7038th (planned 6 students), 2025: 8008th (planned 6 students). No medical program enrollment data for 2021. The 2026 medical program enrollment plan remains 6 students, consistent with the past four years, with no expansion or reduction. Trend-wise, rankings have continuously declined from 2023 to 2025 (ranking number increases, admission difficulty decreases), with an average annual decline of about 900 places.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', and selected for the national 'Double First-Class' construction university list. Located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, it is known for its electronic information disciplines and strong engineering and science strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: As a key construction program in the university's 'New Medicine' direction, Clinical Medicine leverages the university's strong engineering background and interdisciplinary advantages, with rising application popularity in recent years. The medical program enrollment scale in Hunan Province is relatively stable. Clinical Medicine, as a popular long-cycle program, has strong appeal to Hunan candidates. The university is located in Chengdu, a central city in the southwestern region, with good regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the 2026 plan is the same as 2025, but rankings have continuously declined over the past three years (easier to enter). It is predicted that the 2026 ranking will continue to decline slightly. The predicted minimum admission ranking for medical programs at the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Hunan Province in 2026 is approximately 8108th, with a fluctuation range of 7865-8351. Candidates are advised to apply based on their own rankings.

- Clinical Medicine (Shahe Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The University of Electronic Science and Technology of China only offers one medical program in Hunan Province, Clinical Medicine. Candidates whose rankings fall within the predicted range are encouraged to actively apply. Since there is only one program with no tier selection options, it is recommended that candidates target Clinical Medicine as their sole goal and apply based on their own rankings and physical examination requirements.
